# Moved: `lscb-rfc-v0.md` ‚Üí `companion-bench-rfc-v0.md`

This RFC was previously circulated as **LSCB**. It has been rebranded
to **Companion Bench** (Long-Session Companion Benchmark) for the
v1.0 public launch.

The current document lives at:

[`companion-bench-rfc-v0.md`](companion-bench-rfc-v0.md)

This stub will be removed in a future release. Update any bookmarks
or external citations to the new path.
